display.purpose: Philosopher names at hero scale; the main hero title. One per view, never in lists.

headline.purpose: Section headings inside content areas. The scholarly voice of the product.

title.purpose: Era labels, period markers, philosophical era headers. Always small, uppercase, wide-tracked. Never prose.

body.purpose: All interface descriptions, navigation labels, metadata. Max 65-75ch on prose.

label.purpose: Counts, relationship tags, small metadata. Uppercase in select contexts.

shadows.name: ambient-presence
shadows.purpose: Cards at rest. Material weight, not a cast shadow.

shadows.name: state-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards on hover, open panels. Signals elevation change without drama.

shadows.name: primary-button
shadows.purpose: Primary button at rest — gives it physical presence against the flat surface.

motion.name: ease-expo
motion.purpose: All transitions and Framer Motion easings. This is the only easing curve in the system.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Ghost button hover, chip state changes.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Navigation item opacity and icon container transitions.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Switch from mobile (top bar + bottom nav) to desktop (left sidebar).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA on all surfaces outside My Notes. Deep ink background, Cinzel label, ease-expo transition.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Enter the Network <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #09090b; color: #fafaf9; padding: 14px 40px; border: none; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(9,9,11,0.2), 0 2px 8px rgba(9,9,11,0.1); transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #18181b; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(9,9,11,0.25), 0 4px 12px rgba(9,9,11,0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #09090b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action on all surfaces. Transparent with hairline border; Inter font.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background-color: transparent; color: #09090b; padding: 12px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(9,9,11,0.15); border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #f5f5f4; border-color: rgba(9,9,11,0.25); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #18181b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Era Chip
components.description: Era label on philosopher cards and filters. Cinzel, pill shape, monochrome.
components.css: .ds-chip-era { background-color: #f5f5f4; color: #64748b; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; display: inline-block; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: School Card
components.description: Philosopher school listing card. Flat at rest, lifts on hover. All monochrome.
components.html:
Ancient Greece

Stoic Philosophy

A philosophical tradition emphasizing virtue, reason, and resilience in the face of fate.

EpictetusMarcus Aurelius
components.css: .ds-school-card { padding: 28px 28px 24px; background-color: rgba(250,250,249,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(9,9,11,0.07); border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(17,21,26,0.04); transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-school-card:hover { background-color: #fafaf9; border-color: rgba(9,9,11,0.12); box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(17,21,26,0.08); transform: translateY(-3px); } .ds-school-era { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-school-title { font-family: 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; font-style: italic; color: #09090b; line-height: 1.2; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-school-desc { font-family: 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.72; margin: 0 0 16px; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } .ds-school-footer { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-chip-era { background-color: #f5f5f4; color: #64748b; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; display: inline-block; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar nav item with active indicator bar. Monochrome — zinc-900 active, slate-500 inactive.
components.html: Network
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: #64748b; opacity: 0.55; text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: opacity 300ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #18181b; opacity: 1; } .ds-nav-item--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 2px; height: 20px; background-color: #18181b; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; } .ds-nav-chip { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: transparent; transition: background-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-item--active .ds-nav-chip { background-color: rgba(24,24,27,0.09); } .ds-nav-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: My Notes Button (exception)
components.description: Primary CTA within /my-notes ONLY. Uses Manuscript Gold instead of Deep Ink.
components.css: .ds-btn-notes { background-color: #845400; color: #fafaf9; padding: 10px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-notes:hover { background-color: #c47029; } .ds-btn-notes:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #845400; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: My Notes Chip (exception)
components.description: Tag chip within /my-notes ONLY. Parchment tint with gold text and hairline gold border.
components.css: .ds-chip-notes { background-color: #f5eee3; color: #845400; border: 1px solid rgba(132,84,0,0.18); padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; display: inline-block; line-height: 1.6; }

narrative.overview:
A working map is a monochrome discipline: black ink on paper, structure as the aesthetic, hierarchy through weight and scale rather than color. The Living Manuscript treats the philosophy network, the lineage timeline, and the thinkers archive as literal maps of intellectual territory. The design does not decorate this territory; it charts it.

The system operates in two registers. All main surfaces (Network, Lineage, Schools, Thinkers) use the ink-and-paper palette: near-flat monochrome with EB Garamond carrying the scholarly voice, Cinzel providing inscriptional punctuation for era labels, and Inter handling interface chrome. The My Notes section is the explicit exception: it introduces Manuscript Gold as a personal signal, marking a space that belongs to the user rather than to the canon.

The single anti-reference is Wikipedia. Wikipedia fails not through lack of decoration but through lack of confidence: dense text without typographic intention, no sense of place, no hierarchy between what is primary and what is supporting. The Living Manuscript beats Wikipedia not through contrast and color but through considered type scale, deliberate spacing, and the willingness to let blank space hold its ground.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome outside /my-notes; gold is a personal signal, not an accent
EB Garamond for all content the user reads; Inter for interface chrome; Cinzel for inscriptions
Nearly flat; depth through tonal layering, not shadow stacks
Both light and dark modes are primary and designed with equal care

rules.name: The Monochrome Rule
rules.body: All surfaces outside /my-notes use ink-and-paper tokens only. Manuscript Gold and Amber Bronze are prohibited outside My Notes.

rules.name: The Gold Exile Rule
rules.body: The existing codebase carries gold on the hero CTA, school cards, and philosopher panels. These are migration targets. When touching those components, replace gold with monochrome equivalents.

rules.name: The Dark Inversion Rule
rules.body: Dark mode mirrors light mode structurally. Vellum becomes Dark Base; Deep Ink becomes Dark Text. Active Ink inverts from zinc-900 to zinc-300. No hue shifts, lightness only.

rules.name: The Register Rule
rules.body: If the user is reading content, the font is EB Garamond. If navigating or scanning interface chrome, the font is Inter. No exceptions.

rules.name: The Cinzel Rule
rules.body: Cinzel appears only as: era labels, period markers, hero/notes CTA labels, and the sidebar brand name. Always uppercase, always small (0.6-0.75rem), always tracked. Never in headings or body copy.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows respond to state (hover, open, focus) only. A shadow that is always visible is decoration, and decoration is prohibited.

dos: Do use bg-stone-50 dark:bg-stone-950 for base canvases and bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 for secondary surfaces
Do use text-zinc-950 dark:text-stone-100 for all primary text
Do use EB Garamond (font-serif) for all content the user reads, Inter (font-sans) for all navigation and interface chrome
Do use Cinzel (font-cinzel) exclusively for era labels, period markers, CTA labels, and the sidebar brand name
Do use border-zinc-950/[0.07] dark:border-stone-100/[0.07] on cards, all four sides
Do restrict Manuscript Gold (#845400 / #c47029) entirely to /my-notes
Do apply shadows only in response to state, never as static decoration
Do use cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for all transitions and Framer Motion easings
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on all animations
Do migrate gold values found on Network, Lineage, Schools, or Thinkers to monochrome when touching those components
donts: Don't make it feel like Wikipedia: clinical density, no typographic hierarchy, no spatial intention
Don't use Manuscript Gold on any surface outside /my-notes
Don't use EB Garamond for navigation labels, filter controls, or any text the user scans rather than reads
Don't use Cinzel for headings, descriptions, philosopher biographies, or any running text longer than a label
Don't use Playfair Display or Cormorant — they have no defined role in the current system
Don't use a side-stripe border (border-l or border-r as an accent) on any card, callout, or list item
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient)
Don't add shadows to surfaces at rest
Don't animate layout properties — opacity and transform only
Don't use glassmorphism, grain overlays, or parchment texture effects — the atmospheric direction has been retired
